---
title: "SQL — limites & EXPLAIN"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    incremental: true
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    transition: fade
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    code-line-numbers: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    smaller: true
    include-in-header: _mermaid-card.html
---

{{< include ../theorie/outils/sql_recursion.qmd >}}
